data.title: G Square buys majority stake in Finnish MedTech company Serres to drive global growth and sustainability.
data.description: In Espoo, Finland on January 20, 2026, G Square, a prominent European healthcare private equity investor specializing in mid-market companies with strong growth opportunities, has announced a deal to purchase a controlling interest in Serres. Serres is a leading global company in sustainable surgical fluid management. The acquisition involves G Square acquiring a majority stake in Serres, further solidifying their position in the healthcare sector.

data.title: German Armed Forces contracts Circus SE for CA-1 AI robot to provide autonomous supply to soldiers at barracks.
data.description: A global AI robotics company, Circus SE, has secured a contract from the German Armed Forces for the deployment of the CA-1 AI robot for autonomous supply. The contract involves introducing the system at a military barracks in Germany to ensure constant and dependable supply to stationed soldiers. This initiative aims to eliminate reliance on duty hours or return times from military activities. The company's unique ISIN DE000A2YN355 and XETRA code CA1 further identify it.

data.description: Toncoin is displaying promising indicators, with the potential for a 47-54% increase towards targets ranging between $2.30 and $2.40, despite the prevailing bearish trend. data.title: Backlash mounts as Trove keeps $9.4M, new token plunges 95% after switching to Solana from Hyperliquid, enraging initial supporters.
data.description: Last week, Trove surprised the public with a sudden shift to move its perps DEX from Hyperliquid to Solana. This decision caused dismay among a significant portion of its initial supporters.

data.title: Equinor ASA conducting buy-back of shares for employee share programmes (OSE:EQNR, NYSE:EQNR).
data.description: Details have been released regarding transactions carried out as part of Equinor ASA's buy-back initiative. The programme involves shares designated for the company's employee and management incentive schemes. data.title: AlphaTON Capital will launch AI agents on Telegram for its billion users with a focus on privacy.
data.description: AlphaTON Capital has officially signed a definitive agreement to introduce the initial completely privacy-protective AI agents tailored for Telegram’s vast user base of over a billion individuals.

data.title: Aspocomp Group Plc's 2025 net sales increased by 41% to EUR 38.8 million. Operating result improved to EUR 1.1 million.
data.description: Aspocomp Group Plc disclosed preliminary financial information for 2025, reporting a 41% increase in net sales to EUR 38.8 million compared to EUR 27.6 million in the previous year. The operating result also improved significantly, with a EUR 5.0 million increase to EUR 1.1 million from a loss of EUR 4.0 million in the previous year. Operating result as a percentage of net sales was 2.8%, a significant improvement from -14.4% in the previous year. Despite facing challenges due to machinery and equipment availability impacting net sales and profitability, the company achieved record sales in 2025. An investment project valued over EUR 10 million is underway to increase capacity, reduce equipment failures, and enhance production quality, scheduled for completion in 2027. The CEO mentioned the strong demand throughout the year, with the Oulu plant experiencing the record sales. Aspocomp will release its financial statements bulletin and guidance for 2026 on February 25, 2026. The company, headquartered in Espoo with a plant in Oulu, specializes in PCB technology design, testing, and logistics services for electronic device manufacturers globally. For further inquiries, contact CEO Manu Skyttä.

data.title: BingX TradFi hits milestone with 24-hour trading volume surpassing $1 billion, with TradFi Gold contributing $500 million.
data.description: Panama City witnessed a significant development on January 20, 2026, from BingX, a prominent crypto exchange and Web3-AI firm. They proudly shared a massive achievement in their TradFi services, recording a remarkable 24-hour trading volume surpassing $1 billion. Notably, within this impressive figure, the BingX TradFi Gold segment alone accounted for over $500 million.

data.title: NX Group released a global brand movie titled "Moving India Forward" highlighting support for Indian market's dynamism in semiconductor and automotive industries.(Token, Jan. 20, 2026)
data.description: World NX Group has exhibited its commitment to progress by backing advancements in the semiconductor and automotive sectors. The latest global brand film, "Moving India Forward," launched by NIPPON EXPRESS HOLDINGS, INC. in Tokyo on January 20, 2026, highlights this dedication.
